label: Adversarial examples & adversarial training

node.label: Adversarial examples & adversarial training
node.definition: Inputs or opponents are deliberately optimized to expose and reduce model vulnerabilities.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Adversarial examples & adversarial training is to connect Adversarial minimax objectives, Optimization theory to downstream capabilities including Generative adversarial networks, Adversarial robustness & security testing.
examples: substrate for Adversarial robustness & security testing
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial minimax objectives, Optimization theory.

dependencies.rationale: Adversarial examples & adversarial training uses Adversarial minimax objectives as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Adversarial examples & adversarial training uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Adversarial examples & adversarial training uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
